title: pilosella subrubens
intro: Pilosella subrubens, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion and hawkweed family. Traditionally, Pilosella subrubens has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of various digestive issues. Pilosella subrubens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal preparations.
